title: Audio long read: Many people have no mental imagery. What’s going on in their brains?
author: Elizabeth Quill
fullText:
NATURE PODCAST
 02 March 2026
 
 

 

 
 
 
 People with aphantasia are offering brain scientists a window into consciousness.
 
 
 
 
 
 By

 
 
 
 
 Elizabeth Quill
 
 
 
 
 Elizabeth Quill is an editor for Nature in Washington DC.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Benjamin Thompson
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 You have full access to this article via your institution.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 Download the March 2026 long read podcastThis is an audio version of our Feature: Many people have no mental imagery. What’s going on in their brains?Never miss an episode. Subscribe to the Nature Podcast on Apple Podcasts, Spotify, YouTube Music or your favourite podcast app. An RSS feed for the Nature Podcast is available too.
 
 
 
 doi: https://doi.org/10.1038/d41586-026-00626-5
